'''''Kopsh''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] belonging to [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]].

It was used to attack the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''[[Red Claw]]'', which was stranded in space because of a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] attack that disabled the [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]. The attack was unsuccessful and the ''Kopsh'' was destroyed by two loyalist Strike cruisers ''[[Nagan]]'' and ''[[Shotel]]'', with the assistance of [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele's]] [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboat]].

==Behind the scenes==
The ship was called ''Z-Kopsh'' to remind the player that it belonged to [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]].

During the [[Maarek_Stele#New_threats|campaign against rogue TIE Defender technology]] in the [[Eva-T system/Legends|Eva-T system]], the Strike Cruiser was used by four factions; loyalist Imperials commanded by [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], the traitor Zaarin, the [[Rneekii]], and the [[Nami]]
